name: accounting firms managing 5–15 clients/month tool
description: For accounting firms managing 5–15 clients/month, inefficient report compilation causes late submissions to clients. We automate the report generation instead of manual compilation of expense reports.
problem_solved: Inefficient compilation of monthly expense reports from credit card transactions.
features: manual entry of credit card transactions

locked_fields.primary_problem: Inefficient compilation of monthly expense reports from credit card transactions.

must_have_features: manual entry of credit card transactions

one_liner: For accounting firms managing 5–15 clients/month, inefficient report compilation causes late submissions to clients. We automate the report generation instead of manual compilation of expense reports.
